requirement_topic.en: MADS Refrigerant Controls — HCFC Phasedown, ODS Permits, and R-410A / R-32 Transition
requirement_topic.zh: MADS制冷剂管控——HCFC削减、ODS许可及R-410A / R-32过渡
requirement_topic.zht: MADS製冷劑管控——HCFC削減、ODS許可及R-410A / R-32過渡

summary.en: Colombia's Ministerio de Ambiente y Desarrollo Sostenible (MADS) administers obligations under the Montreal Protocol for ozone-depleting substances (ODS), including the HCFC phasedown schedule. R-22 (HCFC-22) use in new air conditioners and heat pumps is subject to Colombia's national HCFC elimination programme under MADS. Importers and manufacturers must obtain ODS import permits from MADS for R-22 charges; R-22 pre-charged products face import restrictions as Colombia advances phasedown targets. Transition refrigerants (R-410A, R-32) are not ODS but are HFCs subject to environmental reporting and handling requirements. Products must be labelled with refrigerant type and charge weight. Safe handling and recovery requirements apply under Colombian environmental regulations.
summary.zh: 哥伦比亚环境与可持续发展部（MADS）依据《蒙特利尔议定书》管理消耗臭氧层物质（ODS）义务，包括HCFC削减时间表。R-22（HCFC-22）在新型空调器和热泵中的使用受MADS主管的哥伦比亚国家HCFC淘汰计划约束。进口商和制造商须向MADS申请R-22充注的ODS进口许可；随着哥伦比亚推进削减目标，R-22预充注产品面临进口限制。过渡制冷剂（R-410A、R-32）不属ODS，但属于HFC，须遵守环境报告和操作要求。产品须标注制冷剂类型和充注重量。哥伦比亚环境法规下须执行安全操作和回收要求。
summary.zht: 哥倫比亞環境與可持續發展部（MADS）依據《蒙特利爾議定書》管理消耗臭氧層物質（ODS）義務，包括HCFC削減時間表。R-22（HCFC-22）在新型空調器和熱泵中的使用受MADS主管的哥倫比亞國家HCFC淘汰計畫約束。進口商和製造商須向MADS申請R-22充注的ODS進口許可；隨著哥倫比亞推進削減目標，R-22預充注產品面臨進口限制。過渡製冷劑（R-410A、R-32）不屬ODS，但屬於HFC，須遵守環境報告和操作要求。產品須標注製冷劑類型和充注重量。哥倫比亞環境法規下須執行安全操作和回收要求。

standards_or_laws: Protocolo de Montreal — Colombia's national HCFC phasedown schedule under MADS
Decreto 423 de 2010 and subsequent MADS resolutions on ODS import controls
MADS — Ministerio de Ambiente y Desarrollo Sostenible (ODS and HFC administration)
NTC-ISO 817 (Refrigerant designation and safety classification — ICONTEC adoption)
NTC-IEC 60335-2-40 (refrigerant safety requirements for heat pumps and AC)

summary.en: China's refrigerant safety regime for heat pump and air-conditioning products is based on GB 9237 (Safety requirements for refrigerating systems and heat pumps) and aligns with ISO 817 refrigerant safety classification. China operates its own HCFC phasedown under the Montreal Protocol. R-22 is being phased down in Chinese domestic production under MEE (Ministry of Ecology and Environment) controls; R-410A and R-32 are common transition refrigerants in Chinese-manufactured heat pumps. China's GB 9237 and MEE ODS controls are domestic regulatory instruments and do not satisfy Colombian MADS ODS permit requirements.
summary.zh: 中国热泵和空调产品的制冷剂安全制度基于GB 9237（制冷系统和热泵的安全要求），并与ISO 817制冷剂安全分类协调。中国依据《蒙特利尔议定书》执行本国HCFC削减。R-22在生态环境部（MEE）管控下正在中国国内生产中逐步淘汰；R-410A和R-32是中国制造热泵常见的过渡制冷剂。中国GB 9237和MEE ODS管控属于国内监管工具，不满足哥伦比亚MADS ODS许可要求。
summary.zht: 中國熱泵和空調產品的製冷劑安全制度基於GB 9237（製冷系統和熱泵的安全要求），並與ISO 817製冷劑安全分類協調。中國依據《蒙特利爾議定書》執行本國HCFC削減。R-22在生態環境部（MEE）管控下正在中國國內生產中逐步淘汰；R-410A和R-32是中國製造熱泵常見的過渡製冷劑。中國GB 9237和MEE ODS管控屬於國內監管工具，不滿足哥倫比亞MADS ODS許可要求。

standards_or_laws: GB 9237 (Safety requirements for refrigerating systems and heat pumps)
MEE (Ministry of Ecology and Environment) HCFC phasedown controls
GB/T 7725 and GB 25454 (refrigerant charge and safety marking requirements)
China Montreal Protocol national plan — MEE / FECO administration

gap.en: Significant gap. R-22-charged heat pumps face import restrictions and require MADS ODS import permits, which are increasingly difficult to obtain as Colombia advances its HCFC phasedown. Chinese exporters should ensure products use transition refrigerants (R-410A or R-32) rather than R-22. Even for R-410A/R-32 products, Colombian environmental labelling (refrigerant type and charge) and proper HFC handling documentation must be prepared in accordance with MADS requirements. Chinese MEE ODS controls and GB 9237 certification do not satisfy Colombian MADS permit obligations.
gap.zh: 存在重大差距。R-22充注热泵面临进口限制，须取得MADS ODS进口许可，随着哥伦比亚推进HCFC削减，许可越来越难以获得。中国出口商应确保产品使用过渡制冷剂（R-410A或R-32）而非R-22。即使对于R-410A/R-32产品，也须依据MADS要求准备哥伦比亚环境标签（制冷剂类型和充注量）及妥善的HFC操作文件。中国MEE ODS管控和GB 9237认证不满足哥伦比亚MADS许可义务。
gap.zht: 存在重大差距。R-22充注熱泵面臨進口限制，須取得MADS ODS進口許可，隨著哥倫比亞推進HCFC削減，許可越來越難以取得。中國出口商應確保產品使用過渡製冷劑（R-410A或R-32）而非R-22。即使對於R-410A/R-32產品，也須依據MADS要求準備哥倫比亞環境標籤（製冷劑類型和充注量）及妥善的HFC操作文件。中國MEE ODS管控和GB 9237認證不滿足哥倫比亞MADS許可義務。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — MADS ODS permit required for R-22-charged imports; refrigerant labelling and HFC handling obligations apply to all refrigerants
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic Chinese production under MEE HCFC controls; GB 9237 safety standard mandatory for refrigerating systems; not equivalent to Colombian MADS ODS permits

source.publisher: Ministerio de Ambiente y Desarrollo Sostenible (MADS), República de Colombia

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Significant gap — R-22-charged products face MADS import restrictions; Chinese exporters should use R-410A or R-32; MADS ODS permit and Colombian refrigerant labelling requirements must be satisfied independently of Chinese MEE controls.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 存在重大差距——R-22充注产品面临MADS进口限制；中国出口商应使用R-410A或R-32；须独立于中国MEE管控，满足MADS ODS许可和哥伦比亚制冷剂标签要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 存在重大差距——R-22充注產品面臨MADS進口限制；中國出口商應使用R-410A或R-32；須獨立於中國MEE管控，滿足MADS ODS許可和哥倫比亞製冷劑標籤要求。
